plato:Entity.rdfs:label: Entity
plato:Entity.rdfs:comment: A superclass for all entities in the ontology to make modeling easier

plato:Resource.rdfs:label: Machine
plato:Resource.rdfs:comment: A machine in the production facility (e.g. a milling machine)

plato:Service.rdfs:label: Service
plato:Service.rdfs:comment: A service offered by a plato:Resource (e.g. milling a hole into a workpiece)

plato:Parameter.rdfs:label: Parameter
plato:Parameter.rdfs:comment: A parameter for a plato:Service (e.g. diameter of the hole that should be milled)

plato:NumericConstant.rdfs:label: NumericConstant
plato:NumericConstant.rdfs:comment: A numeric constant that is used to convert continues parameters (e.g. hole diameter) into discrete parameters

plato:NumericConstantReference.rdfs:label: NumericConstantReference
plato:NumericConstantReference.rdfs:comment: Used to reference a single value or a value range of an numeric constant

plato:Statement.rdfs:label: Statement
plato:Statement.rdfs:comment: A statement describing a precondition or an effect

plato:AdvancedStatement.rdfs:label: AdvancedStatement
plato:AdvancedStatement.rdfs:comment: An advanced statement used to describe disjunctive, universal, or existential preconditions.

plato:AWSSentence.rdfs:label: AWSSentence
plato:AWSSentence.rdfs:comment: A statement (Atomic World State Sentence) describing an atomic state

plato:Predicate.rdfs:label: Predicate
plato:Predicate.rdfs:comment: A predicate used for describing an atomic world state (e.g. 'at' -> workpiece1 at milling_machine)

plato:EntityOrder.rdfs:label: EntityOrder
plato:EntityOrder.rdfs:comment: Used to order entities, e.g. service parameters

plato:Type.rdfs:label: Type
plato:Type.rdfs:comment: A type, e.g. service type, machine type etc.

plato:Cost.rdfs:label: Cost
plato:Cost.rdfs:comment: Used to represent Costs that arise when executing a service

plato:Function.rdfs:label: Function
plato:Function.rdfs:comment: A numerical function used to store numerical values, i.e. a numeric fluent in PDDL

plato:InitialFunctionValue.rdfs:label: InitialFunctionValue
plato:InitialFunctionValue.rdfs:comment: Used to store initial values for a function that has parameters and therefore can have more than one initial value

plato:CostEquationPart.rdfs:label: CostEquationPart
plato:CostEquationPart.rdfs:comment: A part of a cost equation, e.g. an operator, value or function call

plato:EquationOperator.rdfs:label: EquationOperator
plato:EquationOperator.rdfs:comment: An Operator in a cost equation, e.g. '+'

plato:FunctionCall.rdfs:label: FunctionCall
plato:FunctionCall.rdfs:comment: Used to represent function calls in cost equations

plato:CostMap.rdfs:label: CostMap
plato:CostMap.rdfs:comment: Used to map parameter values to numeric values so that non numeric parameters can effect a cost equation

plato:Metric.rdfs:label: Metric
plato:Metric.rdfs:comment: Used to represent a planning metric by providing a cost equation that, for example, weights cost functions
